name: cerberus-re
description: Local Apple-focused reverse-engineering workbench for building a repeatable three-headed static/dynamic/instrumentation loop around Ghidra, LLDB, and Frida.

technical_notes.bridge_xml_patching: Uses xml.etree.ElementTree; removes 'Codex Bridge' PACKAGE, adds CodexBridgePlugin to 'Ghidra Core'; skips malformed XML with warning
technical_notes.stale_lock_detection: bridge-current.lock expires after 30 s via st_mtime check; prevents hangs after crash
technical_notes.windows_process_check: PROCESS_QUERY_LIMITED_INFORMATION (0x1000) + GetExitCodeProcess == 259; handle always closed in finally
technical_notes.publisher_copytree: shutil.copytree with ignore= callback; safe backup removes existing backup dir before move
